title: Equinix (EQIX)-Orange Partnership Boosts Telco Infrastructure
text: Equinix (EQIX) and Orange's latest collaboration boosts the latter's New Generation International Network transformation program through the usage of EQIX's Bare Metal as a Service capability model.

title: Orange and Equinix Bring Cloud Agility to Telco Infrastructure Through Groundbreaking "as a Service" Capability
text: PARIS and REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Orange and Equinix announced today a collaboration to expand the Orange Telco Cloud footprint, using Equinix's Bare Metal as a Service capability—Equinix Metal®—to speed the deployment of Orange's New Generation International Network.

title: SKT vs. EQIX: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: SKT vs. EQIX: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Is it Wise to Retain Equinix (EQIX) in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Robust data-center demand and strategic acquisitions will support Equinix's (EQIX) growth. However, a competitive landscape, huge capital outlays and higher interest rates add to its woes.
